hidden_defects.condition: PAPER portfolio positions used average_entry_price while dashboard only read avg_price or entry_price
hidden_defects.impact: operator could see UNKNOWN entry price even when verified PAPER ledger data existed
hidden_defects.fix: dashboard position rows now map average_entry_price, mark_price, market_value, and cost_basis into display-only rows

hidden_defects.condition: position values were selected through truthiness checks
hidden_defects.impact: valid numeric zero values could be displayed as UNKNOWN
hidden_defects.fix: position display extraction now preserves zero values and only falls back on missing or empty values

hidden_defects.condition: launcher_main and refresh monitor tests wrote to the tracked runtime directory by default
hidden_defects.impact: full test runs could pass while leaving dashboard runtime artifacts dirty, weakening reproducibility
hidden_defects.fix: launcher_main now accepts an explicit runtime root for tests and launcher tests use TemporaryDirectory paths
